---
title: "stpolisci"
about: 
  id: heading
  template: trestles
  image: images/IMG_4421.jpg
  image-width: 200px
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: e-mail
      href: mailto:dto885409@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/stpolisci
---

:::{#heading}

I am an undergraduate student in department of political science, Doshisha University.

- CV
- Researchmap

:::

:::{.callout-note}

## お知らせ

- 2024/04/01
:::

## Research Interests

I am interested in Political Behavior, Elections and Accountability. I primarily employ data science. 

## Publications

under construcrtion


## Presentation

under survey
